testcase.name: runScenario["View cart page", "View cart page"](1)
testcase.system-out: @testDemo Scenario Outline: View cart page &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/automationExercise.feature:12&amp#27;[0m URL: http://automationexercise.com/ &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser opens Chrome browser and navigate to url &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"http://automationexercise.com/"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.SDTesting.open_chrome_and_go_to_url(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m Element FOUND: //a[normalize-space()='Home'] DELAY: Waiting for 1 seconds... &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser verify is on homepage auto exercise&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.SDTesting.user_verify_is_on_homepage()&amp#27;[0m Close ad iframe iframe iframe iframe iframe iframe iframe iframe iframe iframe DELAY: Waiting for 1 seconds... Element FOUND: //h2[normalize-space()='Blue Top'] DELAY: Waiting for 5 seconds... SUCCESS: Input '4' into field with name 'quantity' DELAY: Waiting for 3 seconds... SUCCESS: Press button with text: 'Add to cart' DELAY: Waiting for 2 seconds... SUCCESS: Press button with label: 'View Cart' DELAY: Waiting for 2 seconds... Qty is correct &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser check product and add to cart with qty &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"4"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.SDTesting.user_check_product(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser close browser&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.SDTesting.user_close_browser()&amp#27;[0m
